element_introduction_order.mastery_context: 5 large coins required per stage; persistent across all stages
One heart lost per touch; stun effect; restart level on heart depletion
Full health restoration; scattered throughout levels
Optional collectibles; required for true completion
Entire collection must be found for game victory
Game climax; antagonist defeat required for victory

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting candy to restore full health
Finding safe zones between enemy patrols
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Time-pressure platformer with persistent clock stress; tension builds through enemy encounters and health attrition; relief provided by candy pickups and objective completion

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden friend characters (Joey and Margaret) and Mr. Wilson's coin collection scattered throughout stages

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction in Mr. Wilson's House with basic platforming and enemy mechanics; establishes health/coin/time systems
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Great outdoors and escalating environmental complexity; continued coin collection and friend rescue objectives
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boiler room with environmental hazards; culminates in Switchblade Sam boss battle
notable_spikes: Transition to Boiler Room stage (introduction of environmental hazards)
Final boss encounter with Switchblade Sam (skill and pattern mastery required)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 4 stages requires collection of 5 large coins; coins are dispersed across the level, encouraging exploration and repeated traversal
Stages contain optional friend rescue locations and Mr. Wilson's coin collection; completing all unlocks true victory condition
Player loses hearts on enemy contact; candy power-ups are distributed throughout levels to provide selective health recovery
Stages progress from domestic (house) to outdoor to industrial (boiler room), with corresponding hazard complexity increase
